scripts.dev: bun run --cwd ../../packages/decks build -- --clean=false && CI=1 XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler-config wrangler dev --live-reload
scripts.build: bun run --cwd ../../packages/decks build && CI=1 XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler-config wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir dist
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
